prompt:
Original non-infringing brand logo for a fictional AI infrastructure startup (intended use).
Scene: plain white background, centered composition, generous padding.
Subject: a geometric logo mark plus wordmark for a company called VECTRA.
Key details: mark is a single continuous clean line forming a stylized upward arrow that loops elegantly into a circle at its base, suggesting iteration and ascent; primary color deep indigo #2a2d6e; a single warm amber #f4a020 accent dot at the tip of the arrow; to the right of the mark, the wordmark exactly "VECTRA" in a clean modern geometric sans-serif (Inter-like), slight letter-spacing, deep indigo; flat vector style, sharp clean edges, no gradients.
Constraints: original design, no trademarks, no watermark, no extra text beyond the wordmark, no taglines.
